## What does this PR do?

<!-- Brief description of the change -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New questions
- [ ] Fix wrong answer / explanation
- [ ] New service entry
- [ ] New flashcards
- [ ] UI fix or improvement
- [ ] Other

## Question checklist (if adding/editing questions)

- [ ] All 4 options are plausible — no obviously wrong answers
- [ ] Service names spelled out on first mention in the stem
- [ ] Constraint keyword capitalized in stem (e.g. MOST cost-effective)
- [ ] Each wrong answer explanation names the specific failure reason
- [ ] ID follows the next sequential number for the file
- [ ] Registered in `src/data/questions.ts` if in a new file

## General checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Tested in browser at `localhost:3000`
